title: RNAlater preparation
steps: Prepare 0.1% DEPC-treated water and autocleave it A B 1 Component Volume 2 DEPC 0.5 mL 3 DDW 500 mL
Add these component in 1L bottle in order A B 1 Component Volume 2 Ammonium sulfate 350 g 3 DEPC-treated water 467.5 mL 4 1M tri-sodium citrate 12.5 mL 5 0.5M EDTA 20 mL
Put the bottle on the stirring hot plate, stir till the mixture clear Remember to loose the lid when heating
After cool down, add 8.96 mL 1M sulfuric acid to adjust pH to 5.2
creator: Tsu-Chun Hung
